description: The Sakila Corporate Audit team suspects fraudulent activity in the rental system. Create a forensic reporting view named `v_fraud_report` in the sakila database (host: localhost, user: ga, password: password123) to identify three specific types of anomalies: 'Time Travel' (rentals where the return date is strictly before the rental date), 'Nepotism' (rentals processed by a Staff member for a Customer sharing the same last name, where the payment amount is 0.00), and 'Hoarding' (customers who currently have more than 3 overdue rentals where rental_date is older than 30 days ago). The view must combine these findings using UNION ALL with columns: `fraud_type` (VARCHAR), `incident_id` (INT - use rental_id for Time Travel/Nepotism, customer_id for Hoarding), and `details` (VARCHAR). Export the results of this view to /home/ga/Documents/exports/fraud_report.csv.
